import React,{useState,useRef,useEffect}from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import'./Header.css';import SearchBar from'./SearchBar';import UserMenu from'./UserMenu';import CatalogDropdown from'../Dropdown/CatalogDropdown';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Header=()=>{const[isCatalogOpen,setIsCatalogOpen]=useState(false);const[isMobileMenuOpen,setIsMobileMenuOpen]=useState(false);const catalogRef=useRef(null);// Mobile menyuni ochish/yopish
const toggleMobileMenu=()=>{setIsMobileMenuOpen(!isMobileMenuOpen);};// Mobile menyu ochiq bo'lsa, catalog dropdown yopiladi
useEffect(()=>{if(isMobileMenuOpen){setIsCatalogOpen(false);}},[isMobileMenuOpen]);// Catalog dropdown uchun mouse eventlar
useEffect(()=>{const handleClickOutside=event=>{if(catalogRef.current&&!catalogRef.current.contains(event.target)){setIsCatalogOpen(false);}};document.addEventListener('mousedown',handleClickOutside);return()=>{document.removeEventListener('mousedown',handleClickOutside);};},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("header",{className:"header",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"header-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"logo-section",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:"/",className:"logo",onClick:()=>setIsMobileMenuOpen(false),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:"/logo.png",alt:"MangaUz"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"logo-text",children:"MangaUz"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("nav",{className:"nav-section ".concat(isMobileMenuOpen?'active':''),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"catalog-link",ref:catalogRef,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{className:"catalog-btn",onClick:()=>{setIsCatalogOpen(!isCatalogOpen);if(window.innerWidth<=768){setIsMobileMenuOpen(false);}},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas fa-bars"}),"\u041A\u0430\u0442\u0430\u043B\u043E\u0433"]}),isCatalogOpen&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"catalog-dropdown-wrapper",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CatalogDropdown,{})})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:"/forum",className:"nav-link",onClick:()=>setIsMobileMenuOpen(false),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas fa-comments"}),"\u0424\u043E\u0440\u0443\u043C"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"search-container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(SearchBar,{})})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"user-section",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(UserMenu,{})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"mobile-menu-btn",onClick:toggleMobileMenu,"aria-label":"Toggle menu",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas ".concat(isMobileMenuOpen?'fa-times':'fa-bars')})})]})});};export default Header;
